title: Full Table Scan
context: Large table, no filtering, full table scan, no WHERE clause
root_cause: No WHERE clause, no index used, fetches every row
suggestion: Add WHERE clause to filter rows. Add index on commonly filtered columns. Use LIMIT for pagination.

title: JSON Field Filtering
context: No index on JSON field, large dataset, JSON_EXTRACT in WHERE clause
problem: Unindexed JSON extraction in WHERE clause
root_cause: JSON_EXTRACT on unindexed field forces full table scan on every row
suggestion: Create a generated column for policy_state and index it. Avoid JSON_EXTRACT in WHERE clause.

title: High Frequency Config Query
frequency: very high - thousands of times per minute
context: Fast query but hammers database repeatedly, no caching
problem: High frequency repeated lookup on static data
root_cause: No caching layer, every request hits DB even for unchanging config data
suggestion: Cache config_table results in Redis with 5 minute TTL. Eliminates 90% of DB load.

title: Complex Join with JSON Processing
query: SELECT * FROM policy_data p JOIN claims_data c ON p.policy_id = c.policy_id JOIN config_table cfg ON JSON_TABLE(...)
context: Multiple table joins combined with JSON_TABLE extraction
problem: Expensive join chain with JSON processing
root_cause: JSON_TABLE is expensive, multiple joins multiply the cost exponentially
suggestion: Denormalize JSON fields into proper columns. Index all join keys. Consider materialized views for complex joins.

title: Anomaly - Sudden Latency Spike
query: SELECT * FROM policy_data WHERE status = ACTIVE
execution_time: spiked from 1 second to 50 seconds suddenly
context: Previously fast query, sudden degradation, no code change
problem: Anomaly detected - sudden latency spike 50x normal
root_cause: Table bloat from dead tuples, lock contention, or missing autovacuum
suggestion: Run ANALYZE on table. Check pg_locks for contention. Review autovacuum. Consider table partitioning.

title: Nested Subquery
query: SELECT * FROM policy_data WHERE policy_id IN (SELECT policy_id FROM claims_data WHERE claim_amount > 5000)
context: Subquery inside WHERE clause, not correlated but unoptimized
root_cause: Subquery executes for every outer row, not optimized to JOIN
suggestion: Rewrite as JOIN instead of subquery. Add index on claim_amount and policy_id in claims_data.

title: Aggregation with Multiple Joins
query: SELECT COUNT(*), SUM(claim_amount) FROM claims_data JOIN policy_data JOIN config_table GROUP BY state
context: COUNT and SUM across multiple joined tables
problem: Heavy aggregation across large joined dataset
root_cause: No partial aggregation, full dataset loaded before grouping
suggestion: Add composite index on (state, claim_amount). Consider pre-aggregated summary tables updated nightly.

title: Large Logging Table Query
context: Querying billions of rows in logging table, no partitioning
problem: Full scan on massive unpartitioned logging table
root_cause: Logging tables grow unbounded, no partitioning by date, no archiving
suggestion: Partition table by month. Archive logs older than 90 days. Add index on created_date.

title: Update Query Performance
query: UPDATE policy_data SET status = 'EXPIRED' WHERE end_date < NOW()
context: Bulk update on large table, locks entire table during update
problem: Bulk update causing table lock and slow performance
root_cause: No index on end_date, full scan to find rows, table lock blocks reads
suggestion: Add index on end_date. Batch updates in chunks of 1000 rows. Run during off-peak hours.

title: Knowledge Base Config Lookup
query: SELECT * FROM knowledge_base WHERE category = ? AND key = ?
context: Configuration-driven system, knowledge base queried on every request
problem: Repeated knowledge base lookup with no caching
root_cause: Composite key lookup without proper index, high frequency amplifies cost
suggestion: Add composite index on (category, key). Cache entire knowledge base in application memory at startup.
